test_runs.name: 2_valid_task_id_missing_db
test_runs.verdict: PASS - valid format accepted, graceful DB-missing error

test_runs.name: 3_valid_input_parents_array
test_runs.verdict: PASS - arrays accepted by schema, DB-missing error before Notion call

test_runs.name: 4_error_non_hex_chars
test_runs.verdict: PASS - correctly rejected (k is not a hex char)

deployment_note: Full Notion CRUD tests (create row, idempotent update, field round-trip) require ntn workers deploy which needs interactive OAuth (ntn login). The tool code is structured correctly: query by task_id -> create or update -> return structured response. Will work when deployed with NOTION_TASKS_DATABASE_ID env var.

implementation_highlights.schema_validation: task_id regex checked in execute() since j.string() doesn't support .regex()
implementation_highlights.body_truncation: Notion richText 2000-char limit handled via truncation with ellipsis
implementation_highlights.parents_children: Arrays converted to comma-joined strings before writing to richText
implementation_highlights.project_relation: Preserved on update (not included in properties payload), empty on create
implementation_highlights.error_handling: All errors returned as structured {ok:false, error, task_id} - no throws
implementation_highlights.idempotency: Same input twice -> first creates, second updates same page (query by task_id)
